title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Adobe India

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Adobe India
jsonLd.description:
Adobe India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Software Engineer for our Vijayawada operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Adobe India:
Adobe India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in REST APIs

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Adobe India!
